# Transcrição: What_vibes_do_you_give_off_

- **Fonte:** What_vibes_do_you_give_off_
- **Duração:** 01:21
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:21]

I have a question for you. What kind of vibe do you give off when you talk to others? Some people, when you meet them, they give off a slightly frustrated vibe. Some people, when you meet them, they give off a, you know, slightly sad vibe. And sometimes when you meet someone, sometimes they give a very happy-go-lucky vibe. Now, the thing is, what kind of vibe do you give off? Why is this important, though? Let's say, for example, you have a frustrated vibe, and again, you're unaware of this, and then you speak to other people with a frustrated vibe. Other people are not going to think that you're frustrated with yourself. They're going to think you're frustrated with them. This is why it's so important for you to become more conscious of what vibes are you giving off when you communicate. One of the best ways to become more self-aware of what vibe we give off is to ask those around us. But you have to create a safe environment. So, for example, if you're asking a close friend, you say, hey, friend, look, I really want to build more self-awareness on what my first impressions are, what vibes I give off. Could you tell me what kind of vibe do I give off? And if you create a safe environment for your friends to tell you the truth, they will. I go to my wife, and she always gives it to me straight. She sugarcoats nothing. We are creating first impressions every day. Every time we open our mouths and we communicate, we're creating a first impression. We are giving off vibes. So check your vibe, build self-awareness, and make sure you're amplifying the best parts of you.
